title: Cobblemon Legends: Arceus
description: Pokémon Legends: Arceus sounds and musics for Cobblemon!
body:
Bring the Spirit of Pokémon Legends: Arceus to Cobblemon!

Immerse yourself in your Cobblemon adventures with the iconic soundtrack from Pokémon Legends: Arceus. This specially crafted resource pack perfectly captures the atmosphere and adventurous spirit of the game, replacing Minecraft's in-game soundtrack with tracks from the legendary game. Experience your world like never before with the haunting melodies of Hisui's ancient past.

Disclaimer

All music tracks in this pack are from Pokémon Legends: Arceus.
Copyright for these songs belongs to Nintendo, The Pokémon Company, and Game Freak.
